brief_justification: Arrives at the exact correct answer (C) with accurate definition and mapping to the argument; traces three levels — the specific metric used, what it ignores, and the structural implication of the 80% threshold; no explicit meta-cognitive monitoring or bias-naming about its own process, only straightforward linear analysis; verifies by testing all three distractors and explaining why each fits less well; acknowledges partial overlap with status quo bias ('there's an element of this') but doesn't quantify confidence or flag what would shift the answer; systematically addresses all three alternatives with specific, named reasons for rejection; every conclusion is traceable — the historical McNamara definition is given, the mapping to the argument is explicit, and the 80% threshold is identified as the diagnostic tell.
